invite_earn: Invite friends and earn from their profitable trades!
referral_levels: • Level 1: 20% of profit share • Level 2: 7% of profit share • Level 3: 3% of profit share
welcome_back: Welcome back to Aladdin! 🧞‍♂️ Your Universal Copy-Trading Bot Connect your exchange and start copying professional strategies automatically: 🤖 Bing-Bot: Advanced futures trading (BingX) 🎯 TradeMax: Reliable spot trading (OKX) Simply connect, allocate capital, and let Aladdin trade for you!
err_tx_used:
❌ Verification failed.
Reason: This transaction has already been used.
err_invalid_api:
❌ Verification failed.
Reason: Invalid response from blockchain explorer.
err_api_key_invalid:
❌ Verification failed.
Reason: API Key is invalid. Please contact support.
msg_verification_pending:
⏳ Verification pending.
Reason: Please wait a few minutes and try again.
err_not_usdt:
❌ Verification failed.
Reason: Payment was not made in USDT (BEP-20).
err_wrong_address:
❌ Verification failed.
Reason: Payment sent to wrong address.
err_incorrect_amount:
❌ Verification failed.
Reason: Incorrect amount. Expected {expected}, received {received:.4f} USDT.
msg_payment_success: ✅ Payment successful! Welcome to Aladdin. You now have full access.
msg_referral_reward: 🎉 Congratulations! You received {reward} USDT for a successful referral.
err_unexpected: ❌ An unexpected error occurred during verification.
msg_analyzing_chart: 🔍 Analyzing chart with AI (recognizing symbol and timeframe)...
msg_ai_identified: ✅ AI identified: {ticker} at {display_timeframe} Fetching live data...
err_fetch_failed: ❌ Found {ticker}, but couldn't fetch its data from the exchange.
err_ticker_not_found: ❌ Sorry, the AI could not identify a valid ticker on this chart.
err_no_trade_plan: ❌ Sorry, analysis did not produce a valid trade plan.
err_unexpected_analysis: ❌ An unexpected error occurred during the analysis.
msg_ask_reserve: 💰 Trading Capital Configuration Aladdin needs to know how much of your funds to use for trading. Trading Capital = The maximum amount Aladdin will use. Any funds above this amount will stay in your wallet untouched. Your Current Balance: ${balance} Enter the amount you want to allocate for trading (e.g., 1000).
msg_reserve_saved: ✅ Success! Exchange: {exchange} Strategy: {strategy} Trading Capital: ${reserve} Aladdin is now connected.
msg_no_exchanges: You haven't connected any exchanges yet.
msg_edit_reserve_prompt: 💰 Edit Trading Capital: {exchange} This is the amount Aladdin is allowed to trade with. Available Balance: ${balance} 💰 Enter New Capital Amount (USDT):
msg_what_to_change: What do you want to change?
msg_edit_risk_prompt: ⚖️ Edit Risk Percentage ({exchange}) Enter new Risk % per trade (e.g. 2.5).
msg_profit_notification: 💰 Profit Realized! 📈 {symbol} 💵 Profit: ${pnl} 💸 Fee (40%): {fee} USDT 🏦 Balance: {balance} USDT
msg_next_steps: What would you like to do next?
err_daily_limit: ⛔ Daily Limit Reached You have used your 5 free chart analyses for today. Please come back tomorrow (UTC time) to analyze more charts.
msg_how_to_top_up: How to Top Up Your Fee Balance: USDT is used to pay the 40% performance fee on profitable trades. 1. Send any amount of USDT (BEP-20) to this address: {address} 2. After sending, paste the Transaction Hash (TxID) here in the chat to credit your balance.
msg_help_active: 🧞‍♂️ Aladdin - Crypto Chart Analyst Here's how you can use me: 1. Press the 'Analyze Chart 📈' button below. 2. Send me a clear screenshot of a candlestick chart. 3. I will analyze it and provide a technical outlook. What I can do: • Recognize cryptocurrency symbols from charts • Fetch live market data from Binance • Analyze technical indicators (EMA, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands) • Provide trading ideas with entry zones and targets • Calculate position sizes based on your risk profile Risk Management: • Set your account balance and risk percentage • Get automatic position size calculations • Manage your risk per trade Referral System: • Earn 25 USDT for Level 1 referrals • Withdraw USDT to your wallet Available Commands: /start - Restart the bot /help - Show this help message /profile - View your profile /risk - Set up risk management Your access is active! Press the buttons below to get started!
msg_help_inactive: 🧞‍♂️ Aladdin - Crypto Chart Analyst This bot provides AI-powered technical analysis of cryptocurrency charts. How it works: 1. Send a screenshot of any crypto chart 2. I'll recognize the symbol and analyze it 3. Get detailed trading insights with entry/exit points Subscription: • One-time payment of {amount} USDT for 1 month access • Or use a valid promo code • Full access to all analysis features • Referral system to earn USDT • Risk management with position sizing To get started: Use /start to activate your access with payment or promo code. Use /start to begin the activation process!
msg_withdraw_amount: Please enter the amount of USDT you wish to withdraw:
err_insufficient_balance: Insufficient balance. You only have {balance:.2f} USDT. Please enter a valid amount.
msg_withdraw_wallet: Great! Now, please paste your BEP-20 (BSC) wallet address for the withdrawal.
err_invalid_amount: Invalid amount. Please enter a number greater than 0.
err_invalid_wallet: Invalid wallet address. Please paste a valid BEP-20 address (starts with 0x).
msg_withdraw_submitted: ✅ Your withdrawal request has been submitted! Please allow up to 24 hours for processing.
msg_select_strategy: 🤖 Select Trading Strategy Bing-Bot: Futures trading (BingX Only) TradeMax: Spot trading (OKX Only)
msg_exchange_config: 🔶 {exchange} Configuration 👉 Step 1: Go to API Management: {link} (Login if required) 👉 Step 2: Create new API Keys with these settings: - Permissions: Enable '{perm} Trading'. - ❌ DO NOT enable 'Withdrawals'. - IP Access: Select 'Restrict access to trusted IPs only' and paste this IP: {ip} 👉 Step 3: See screenshots for guidance 👇
msg_enter_api_key: 🔑 Enter API Key Please paste your API Key below:
msg_enter_secret_key: 🔒 Enter Secret Key Now paste your Secret Key:
msg_connect_success: ✅ Connected Successfully! Exchange: {exchange} Strategy: {strategy} Aladdin is now ready to copy trades according to your strategy.
msg_enter_passphrase: 🔐 Enter Passphrase OKX requires a Passphrase (password) that you set when creating the API key. Please enter it below:
err_invalid_balance: Invalid number. Please enter a positive number for your balance (e.g., 10000).
msg_risk_pct_current:
Great. Your current risk per trade is: {risk_pct}%
Please enter your new risk percentage (e.g., 1 for 1%), or type 'skip' to keep it.
err_invalid_risk_pct: Invalid percentage. Please enter a number between 0 and 100 (e.g., 1.5).
msg_risk_updated:
✅ Risk profile updated!

  - Account Balance: ${balance:,.2f}
  - Risk per Trade: {risk_pct}%

I will now use these settings to calculate position sizes for your trades.
msg_view_chart: 📈 Live Chart Analysis Click the button below to open TradingView where you can: • View real-time cryptocurrency charts • Analyze different timeframes • Use technical indicators • Take screenshots for analysis After analyzing the chart, come back and use the 'Analyze Chart 📈' button to get my insights!
msg_promo_how_many: How many promo codes do you want to generate? (e.g., 10)
msg_promo_duration: Great. Now select the duration for these codes:
err_invalid_duration: Please select a valid duration from the buttons.
msg_promos_ready: ✅ Here are your {count} new promo codes, each valid for {duration} days.
msg_promos_next: Promo codes generated. What would you like to do next?
msg_promo_success: ✅ Promo code accepted! Your access is active for {days} days.
err_promo_invalid: ❌ This promo code is invalid or has already been used.
err_context_expired: Sorry, the context for this analysis has expired.
msg_topup_success: ✅ Success! Topped up with {amount:.2f} USDT. Your new balance is {balance:.2f} USDT.
msg_copytrading_re_enabled: ✅ Your fee balance is now positive. Copy trading has been re-enabled!
err_unknown_command: Unknown command. Please use the buttons below.
msg_subscription_expired: ⛔ Insufficient Fee Balance Your fee balance is low. Copy trading has been disabled. Please use Top Up USDT to resume trading.
msg_aladdin_setup: 🧞‍♂️ Aladdin Setup Click the button below to configure your specific settings via the Mini App.
